response.justification: The candidate is a poor fit for this role due to a complete mismatch on several core, mandatory requirements. He does not possess the required native-level Japanese language proficiency. Furthermore, his professional experience is overwhelmingly in web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang), with very little and dated experience in the required C programming for embedded systems. He also lacks any demonstrated experience with the specified networking (L2/L3, switches) or security (MACsec, 802.1X) technologies.
strengths: Extensive experience as a senior software engineer across various companies.
Broad technical skillset in web technologies, microservices, and CI/CD.
Demonstrates initiative through open-source contributions, workshops, and founding a project.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory native-level Japanese language proficiency.
No significant or recent experience in C programming for embedded or UNIX environments.
No demonstrated experience in the required networking and security domains (L2/L3, MACsec, 802.1X).

key_factors.factor: C Programming and Linux Kernel Experience
